rows.label: tev014601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Saiden about area names.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Saiden if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Saiden how he fared during the enemy attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Saiden if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0001
rows.name:
My team, Team Belisarda,
actually got to name a number
of places in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0002
rows.name:
We tried to punch 'em up a little,
but I don't know how well we did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0003
rows.name:
Shingo actually wanted to name
everything in Japanese, but we convinced
him to stick with mostly English.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0004
rows.name:
I get where he's coming from, but you
gotta consider the target audience when
you come up with these names, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0010
rows.name: I'm worried about Shingo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0013
rows.name:
He used to go looking for
Lao and follow him around.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0014
rows.name:
But now he just announces that he's going to the
commercial district and rarely comes back. And
he seems quite distracted at team meetings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0015
rows.name:
I wonder if he's gotten sick of his
team and now wants to spend as
little time with us as possible?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0016
rows.name:
Lao went to talk to him too, but...
Man, I have a bad feeling about this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0028
rows.name:
I regret having left
the restricted hangar.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0029
rows.name:
We had a duty to fulfill the orders that
Commander Vandham had given us, no matter
the cost. Even if it meant our own deaths![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0030
rows.name:
But that was the decision Lao made,
and I can't be questioning the
orders of my superior officer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0031
rows.name:
Honestly, I still don't
understand how the enemy even
knew that Doll was in there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Saiden about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0032
rows.name: I heard all about Shingo from Lao.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0033
rows.name:
I know we put you guys through a lot
of bother. Thank you for all you did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0034
rows.name:
I thought of Shingo as a child,
but I guess I've got to accept
that he's a man now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014601_MSG0035
rows.name:
Hopefully now he'll work hard
to become stronger so he can
protect that girlfriend of his.[ST:wait ]
